comment: Version-controlled query set. Edit per-vault so 'rare' actually matches and 'phrase' actually exists. Re-running with the same set is what makes results comparable across snapshots and adapters.

queries.notes: Replace with a single high-frequency term in your vault.
Quoted phrase. Confirm the plugin's simple-search supports phrase syntax for your version.
Should match very few or zero notes. Picks up cold-cache pathological behaviour.

reads._hint: After running `harness profile`, paste the smallest and one of the largest note paths from vault-stats.json here. Leave null to have bench auto-pick from the stats file.

_runsHint: N≥20 per the build brief. Increase for noisier numbers; decrease only when iterating.
